member.name: T:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Integration event published when an amendment is proposed in the Ideation bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about amendment creation without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the proposed amendment.
The ID of the target idea being amended.
The ID of the creator.
The proposed title for the amendment.
The proposed body content for the amendment.
The title of the amendment.
The description of the amendment.
When the amendment was proposed.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Integration event published when an amendment is proposed in the Ideation bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about amendment creation without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the proposed amendment.
The ID of the target idea being amended.
The ID of the creator.
The proposed title for the amendment.
The proposed body content for the amendment.
The title of the amendment.
The description of the amendment.
When the amendment was proposed.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.AmendmentId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the proposed amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.TargetIdeaId
member.summary: The ID of the target idea being amended.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.CreatorId
member.summary: The ID of the creator.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.ProposedTitle
member.summary: The proposed title for the amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.ProposedBody
member.summary: The proposed body content for the amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.AmendmentTitle
member.summary: The title of the amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.AmendmentDescription
member.summary: The description of the amendment.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.AmendmentProposedIntegrationEvent.ProposedAt
member.summary: When the amendment was proposed.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent
member.summary: Integration event published when an idea is authored in the Ideation bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about idea creation without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the authored idea.
The ID of the creator.
The society context (governance jurisdiction) of the idea.
The title of the idea.
The body content of the idea.
The signal references associated with the idea.
The tags associated with the idea.
When the idea was authored.
The parent idea ID if the idea was forked from another idea.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String},System.DateTimeOffset,System.String)
member.summary: Integration event published when an idea is authored in the Ideation bounded context. This event is used to notify other bounded contexts about idea creation without creating direct dependencies.
member.param: The unique identifier of the authored idea.
The ID of the creator.
The society context (governance jurisdiction) of the idea.
The title of the idea.
The body content of the idea.
The signal references associated with the idea.
The tags associated with the idea.
When the idea was authored.
The parent idea ID if the idea was forked from another idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.IdeaId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the authored idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.AuthorId
member.summary: The ID of the creator.

member.summary: The society context (governance jurisdiction) of the idea.

member.summary: The title of the idea.

member.summary: The body content of the idea.

member.summary: The signal references associated with the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.Tags
member.summary: The tags associated with the idea.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.AuthoredAt
member.summary: When the idea was authored.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Ideation.Contracts.IdeaAuthoredIntegrationEvent.ParentIdeaId
member.summary: The parent idea ID if the idea was forked from another idea.
